testcase.name: deveExibirPaginaPrincipalComListaVazia
testcase.system-err:
Unexpected problem occured during version sanity check Reported exception: java.lang.AbstractMethodError: Receiver class org.slf4j.simple.SimpleServiceProvider does not define or inherit an implementation of the resolved method 'abstract java.lang.String getRequesteApiVersion()' of interface org.slf4j.spi.SLF4JServiceProvider. at
